summary: Iteration 215 - Cinematic UX Enhancements Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) Dynamic Docking - CosmicAssistant repositions from (1848,880) to (1788,1008) when CosmicMixer opens. (2) Buttons have 72px vertical gap - no overlap. (3) SmartDock stopPropagation working - panels stay open when clicking inside. (4) Five Elements Wheel proximity scaling implemented (up to 15% larger + glow ring). (5) Star Chart 3-phase dolly zoom implemented (pullback→traverse→approach). (6) All backend APIs working.
critical_code_review_comments: CosmicAssistant.js lines 12-22: useMixerState hook with MutationObserver watching data-mixer-open - VERIFIED working
CosmicAssistant.js lines 221-232: Dynamic position with cubic-bezier spring transition - VERIFIED repositioning
CosmicMixer.js lines 214-216: Broadcasts data-mixer-open attribute on body - VERIFIED
FiveElementsWheel.js lines 140-142: Proximity scaling calculation (up to 15% larger) - VERIFIED implemented
FiveElementsWheel.js lines 152-156: Proximity glow ring when cursor approaches - VERIFIED implemented
SmartDock.js lines 274-297: Panel wrappers with stopPropagation - VERIFIED working
StarChart.js lines 926-959: 3-phase dolly zoom (pullback→traverse→approach) - VERIFIED implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 215 verified cinematic UX enhancements: (1) Dynamic Docking - CosmicAssistant uses useMixerState hook with MutationObserver to watch document.body data-mixer-open attribute. When mixer opens, assistant moves from bottom:148px/right:20px to bottom:20px/right:80px with cubic-bezier spring transition. (2) Buttons have 72px vertical gap - CosmicAssistant at y=880, CosmicMixer at y=952. (3) SmartDock panels wrapped in stopPropagation containers. (4) Five Elements Wheel tracks mousePos via onMouseMove and applies proximity-based scaling (up to 15% larger) with glow ring. (5) Star Chart dolly zoom uses 3-phase system: pullback (zoom out), traverse (rotate to target), approach (zoom in).

dynamic_docking.details: CosmicAssistant repositions from (1848,880) to (1788,1008) when CosmicMixer opens - spring transition working

button_overlap.details: 72px vertical gap between buttons - no overlap

smartdock_stoppropagation.details: Harmonics panel stayed open after clicking inside - stopPropagation working

five_elements_proximity_scaling.details: Code verified: proximityScale = 1 + proximity * 0.15 (up to 15% larger), glow ring appears when proximity > 0.2

star_chart_dolly_zoom.details: 3-phase system implemented: pullback (zoom to 1.8x radius), traverse (rotate to target), approach (zoom to target radius)

star_chart_page.details: Page loads without coordinate freeze, 3 canvas elements rendered, all controls visible

botany_page.details: Five Elements Wheel visible, Wood node clickable, plant cards visible, garden section visible

cinematic_ux_features_tested.behavior: Button repositions with cubic-bezier spring transition when mixer opens
